text.p: Sorry about the cold o.Jide obi gi aka, I nu.Maybe they are in the harmattan season now just as we are and may soon enter the okochi. Meanwhile,I was reliably informed that there are Nigerian shops there where they sell elo aki and okwome (sheabutter).I am sure those would be more effective than all those creams they sell there.On a more serious note,I heard that what they have there now is winta which is a child's play from the real thing, wiukwu her elder sister.Just learn to cope, afterall, aki guru nwata aguu anaghi aru ya afo.

As far as I can remember, only gave me your rechargeable lamp.What should I do with it because it is lying fallow here. has reference in 2 courses.So she is coming back. Your'supervisees' did well. Those graded or second-marked by made C's while others made B's. missed A by whiskers. is not back as such but was here yesterday to vote in the ASUU election.
wrote a very beautiful paper though his voice can sometimes be husky.But it was a good outing,nevertheless.

Fresh students resume December 6,while stale ones resume exactly a month after. As for the fone, I'll see what I can do when the salary is paid. I don't think the monthly returns issue went in your favor. I am sure that before asked for a second one to be issued and signed,he had made up his mind what he wanted to do.That guy is really beginning to prove that he has a small mind.But that is a matter for anothe mail.
Enjoy the uguru to the fullest.

Ol boy,na wa o.I really feel you.Don't mind that I have not written since.Our server was down again! Today was the first day it would work in God knows how long.I probably told you that the last mail I sent you was from a cybercafe.

Yes the Igbo program has taken off and we had our first class yesterday.Only 5 were present and I spent the greater part of the time to disabuse their minds of feelings of inferiority. I think we are on track.

I have to stop.I have stomach ache and the pain is too much.If we are online tomorrow I shall tell you about the full blown war between the VC and people, including the Oba. Ol boy you are missing. Salivate until I get beta. If you want it quicker,pray. The dean said he was not happy that you did not send to tell him you got to your destination safely.

Na wayas o.So you just decide to forget me like that ee kwa? God dey na poor man prayer. If you have forgotten me, me I no go forget you.By the way, Happy new year in advance, sorry in arrears.How are you coping with the cold,or has it abated now? In fact,don't envy us o because the harmattan this year was imported. It is marvellously unmerciful. Everybody is complaining.

So how is life over there now? I believe you have settled in by now.Keep it up.I need not remind you that you have your destiny in your hands now.What you make of it now will decide whether you are coming back to start counting days with again or not. I am sure you will make the best of where you are now, and as we discussed before you left, if it is possible for you to get a PhD there before coming back, just go ahead and do that and decide what to do with the one here when you come back.

We have nine candidates for the Igbo program so far,that is talking about those who have already cleared. Maybe more will clear before the end of the admission exercise.At least the program is off the ground and there will be no going back and nine students is not a bad start at all.
My regards to the friends I am sure you have made there.
